## Reproduction

```console
uv run --frozen --no-sync --package market-research python tools/platform_completeness.py --check-report
```

Receipts are read from the repository-external directory supplied by `--evidence-root` or `MARKET_RESEARCH_COMPLETENESS_EVIDENCE_ROOT`.
